Package com.mohanad.edufinance.model

Class Teacher

java.lang.Object
com.mohanad.edufinance.model.Person
com.mohanad.edufinance.model.Teacher
All Implemented Interfaces:
Payable
public class Teacher extends Person implements Payable
Concrete class representing a Teacher in the EduFinance system. Inherits common attributes from Person (Inheritance) and implements Payable to calculate monthly earnings polymorphically (Polymorphism).
Author:
MOHANAD

  • Constructor Details

    • Teacher

      public Teacher()
      Default constructor.

    • Teacher

      public Teacher(int id, String name, String payType, double payValue, Integer gradeId)
      Parameterized constructor.
      Parameters:
      id - The teacher's unique ID
      name - The teacher's name
      payType - The type of payment: 'FIXED' or 'HOURLY'
      payValue - The salary value (fixed salary or hourly rate)
      gradeId - The ID of the grade/class taught (can be null)

  • Method Details

    • getPayType

      public String getPayType()
      Gets the payment type of the teacher.
      Returns:
      The payment type: 'FIXED' or 'HOURLY'

    • setPayType

      public void setPayType(String payType)
      Sets the payment type of the teacher.
      Parameters:
      payType - The payment type to set ('FIXED' or 'HOURLY')

    • getPayValue

      public double getPayValue()
      Gets the salary or session rate value.
      Returns:
      The payment value

    • setPayValue

      public void setPayValue(double payValue)
      Sets the salary or session rate value.
      Parameters:
      payValue - The payment value to set

    • getGradeId

      public Integer getGradeId()
      Gets the ID of the grade taught by the teacher.
      Returns:
      The grade ID (can be null)

    • setGradeId

      public void setGradeId(Integer gradeId)
      Sets the ID of the grade taught by the teacher.
      Parameters:
      gradeId - The new grade ID to set (can be null)

    • calculatePay

      public double calculatePay(int sessions)
      Implementation of Payable.calculatePay(int). Polymorphically computes the pay based on the teacher's payType: - FIXED: Returns the fixed payValue directly (sessions argument is ignored). - HOURLY: Returns the product of the sessions and the hourly payValue rate.
      Specified by:
      calculatePay in interface Payable
      Parameters:
      sessions - The number of sessions taught during the period
      Returns:
      The total computed salary payment

    • getGradeName

      public String getGradeName()
      Gets the name of the grade taught by the teacher.
      Returns:
      The grade name

    • setGradeName

      public void setGradeName(String gradeName)
      Sets the name of the grade taught by the teacher.
      Parameters:
      gradeName - The grade name to set

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Person
